criteria.name: Requirements Met
criteria.description: Does the generated code include all required features from the problem statement and acceptance criteria?

criteria.name: Functional Correctness
criteria.description: Would the code likely run without errors? Is the logic sound for the stated requirements?

criteria.name: Code Structure
criteria.description: Clean organization, sensible naming, appropriate separation of concerns.

criteria.name: UI Completeness
criteria.description: For web types: layout, styling, and visual structure are present and coherent. For backend: N/A aspects score based on API surface completeness.

criteria.name: Best Practices
criteria.description: Follows basic best practices: accessibility hints for web, input validation for APIs, no obvious security issues.
